=== text.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan
Aitken Center
University Of New Brunswick Fredericton, New Brunswick, Canada
April 7, 1997

***  HOLY GRAIL  ***

Sourced from LB-1529:
http://jokerman.org.uk/lb/detail/LB-01529.html

Wave Repair 4.9.3 fixed micro gaps on:

t07 Oh baby it ain't no lie at 4:02
t09 It's all over now, baby blue at 1:45
t15- Rainy Day Women # 12 & 35 at 00:41 seconds.


01. Crash On The Levee (Down In The Flood) 
02. Tonight I'll Be Staying Here With You
03. All Along The Watchtower 
04. Under The Red Sky 
05. Most Likely You Go Your Way (And I'll Go Mine) 
06. Silvio (Bob Dylan & Robert Hunter) 
07. Oh Baby It Ain't No Lie (Elizabeth Cotton) 
08. Masters Of War 
09. It's All Over Now, Baby Blue 


10. Seeing The Real You At Last 
11. I And I 
12. Highway 61 Revisited 
13. Like A Rolling Stone 
14. The Times They Are A-Changin' 
15. Rainy Day Women # 12 & 35 

Concert # 858 of The Never-Ending Tour
Concert # 5 of the 1997 Spring Tour of Canada and USA
1997 concert # 16

Concert # 5 with the 11th Never-Ending Tour Band:
Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar)
Bucky Baxter (pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar)
Larry Campbell (guitar)
Tony Garnier (bass)
David Kemper (drums & percussion)

7-9, 14 acoustic with the band
14 Bob Dylan harmonica

NOTE: All Along The Watchtower is played in concert for the 1000th time!!
9 new songs (60%) compared to previous concert
6 new songs for this tour

Stereo audience recording, 120 minutes
